svg.title: Graphical solution for the finite square well bound states
svg.desc: Two panels. A quarter-circle of radius z0 is intersected by the z·tan z branches (even states) and the −z·cot z branches (odd states). For z0 = 3π/4 there are two crossings (two bound states); for z0 = 3π/2 there are four. Each crossing is one bound state, labelled E1, E2, … in order of increasing energy.

cajal:figure.figure-title: Graphical solution for finite-well bound states
cajal:figure.author: Humanitarians AI Incorporated

text.tspan: Graphical solution for finite-well bound states
